docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM SERVED DEC-01-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VANWINKLE, JOHN R.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANWINKLE, JOHN R. $3,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $456.68 INTEREST, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,691.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-12-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT VANWINKLE, JOHN R.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT VANWINKLE, JOHN R.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT VANWINKLE, JOHN R. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-27-2012
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE AS TO DREW ELLIOTT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT VANWINKLE, JOHN R.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT VANWINKLE, JOHN R.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
